section.title: AI Impact on Job Content and Skills
section.description: This section explores how AI is affecting your work activities and the skills required in your role.

questions.text: Please rate your agreement with each statement below (1 = Strongly Disagree, 5 = Strongly Agree):

rows.label: AI has reduced the time I spend on administrative and reporting tasks.
AI has increased the time I spend on strategic activities (e.g., stakeholder management, risk trade-offs, value delivery).
AI is changing the skills required for my role.
I expect some of my current responsibilities to be automated within the next 3–5 years.
I have needed to learn new skills to effectively use AI tools in my work.
Even when I use AI tools, I remain responsible for verifying the accuracy and quality of the outputs.

questions.text: Which skills are becoming more important in your role due to AI? (Select all that apply)

options.label: Critical thinking / validation of AI outputs
